_meta.description: AI automation tier for rollout tasks. auto = SSH/sudo + secrets vault, minimal human steps. assisted = AI does bulk work; you provide creds, OAuth, physical confirm, or spot-check. Omit = physical device, account enrollment, or subjective desktop prefs.

auto.glue-04b: chezmoi apply on rig + mini — dotfiles already in repo
auto.docker-16: MusicSeerr compose deploy on Mac mini
auto.ha-12: Mosquitto + Zigbee2MQTT stack (needs coordinator plugged in)
auto.ha-15: Frigate on NAS compose (if cameras ready)
auto.ha-17: LiteLLM gateway compose + small fallback model
auto.nas-04: restic → B2 on Ubuntu (needs B2 app key once)
auto.media-04: Tdarr server on NAS + rig node

assisted.nas-01: DSM Snapshot Replication — mostly GUI; AI can drive via SSH where possible
assisted.seed-07: E2E media test — AI triggers request; you confirm Plex playback
assisted.seed-10: E2E music test — same spot-check pattern
assisted.ha-02: HA Green onboarding — you plug in; AI finishes integrations
assisted.ha-03: HAOS VM — install-haos-vm.sh; you pick primary vs Green path
assisted.ha-05: Hue — bridge button press + LAN discovery
assisted.ha-09: Voice stack — mic test + Assist pipeline tuning
assisted.ha-14: UniFi Protect → HA — local API creds
assisted.ha-16: HomeKit Bridge — Apple Home pairing code on phone
assisted.ebook-06: E2E ebook verify — AI runs pipeline; you check Kobo/CWA
assisted.nas-02: Hyper Backup → B2 — B2 bucket + app key once
assisted.nas-03: Tier-2 HDD rotation — you plug drive in
assisted.nas-07: restore-test.sh — you confirm restored files look right
assisted.glue-06: Rebuild drill capstone — AI runs; you spot-check services
assisted.sec-03: B2 Object Lock + Healthchecks — cloud console + ping URL
assisted.sec-04: CrowdSec + forward-auth — API keys + test attack
assisted.game-03: Heavy game servers — pick title + friend test
assisted.ai-01: ComfyUI / Open WebUI RAG — model download choices
